scripts.build: npm run build -w @local-ai/shared && npm run build -w @local-ai/stt-worker && npm run build -w @local-ai/orchestrator && npm run build -w @local-ai/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @local-ai/shared && npm run typecheck -w @local-ai/stt-worker && npm run typecheck -w @local-ai/orchestrator && npm run typecheck -w @local-ai/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w @local-ai/stt-worker && npm run test -w @local-ai/orchestrator
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run dev -w @local-ai/desktop
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start -w @local-ai/desktop
